description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is predominantly white with large windows, a driveway with a parked car, and a small landscaped area featuring trees and shrubs. The house includes a spacious patio area with outdoor furniture and an umbrella, as well as a green lawn section. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and minimal decorative elements. The overall design emphasizes functionality and open outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, white two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, driveway, patio, and landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, parked car, main entrance, and a tree near the entryway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the patio with outdoor furniture, umbrella, and a secondary entry point.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large green lawn, patio area, and asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear view of the driveway, car, and additional green space.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door with no porch, minimal steps, and a small landscaped area adjacent
